title: Accused
tmdbOverview: When a celebrated queer doctor in London is accused of sexual misconduct, her life unravels. Now under a storm of suspicion and scrutiny, her marriage fractures and the truth blurs. Her wife must decide whether to walk away, or fight for the woman the world is turning against.
synopsis: Accused is a 2026 thriller, mystery and drama film from India. It has a 5.5 rating on TMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a +16 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
